title: Patient Services Representative
description: Stryker is seeking a Patient Services Representative to support patients using our medical devices in the Durham area. You'll provide education, answer questions, and help patients navigate their medical device options. This onsite role offers direct patient impact and exposure to medical device innovation.
responsibilities: Respond to patient inquiries about medical devices; provide education on usage and care
Coordinate with healthcare providers to ensure patient access to needed devices
Maintain patient database and communication records; ensure HIPAA compliance
Support patient education and support programs; facilitate device training sessions
Gather patient feedback and communicate insights to product and clinical teams
